result.finding: cited prior work (already in the LC records): long-chain PFAS are strongly retained in roots while short chains are mobile to shoot/grain (newcontam 2025; Adu 2024 ML, 10.1021/acsestengg.4c00107, MW the top translocation predictor); Chen 2025 membrane K_MW (10.1021/acs.est.4c06734). This run synthesizes LC4/LC5b/LC6, not a novelty claim.
